ab: kinacu amen a vuaq nua nia sinsi a sema puqemuzimuzipan, na kitaljizan amen izuwa i sitjumaq tua paljing a veneli tua kipu.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: ka temdep anga amen izuwa i puqemuzimuzipan, qivu aza nia sinsi: ”aicu i paqayaqayav a mareka qayaqayam, azua i pasalikuz a mareka qatjuvi, vayku a masatalj a kitju talidu aya.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: marekutj aken ta qatjuvi, vanasika ika aken a talidu ta qatjuvi.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: pacun anga aken tua liav aravac a qayaqayam, i vavav tua kasiv tiamadju a kipasasivasivalj a mipereper, izua uta ku pinacunan a ljequ a nataqed itua buang nua kasiv.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有我看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: azua i puqemuzimuzipan izua zau, rigi kata likuljav, inia ke pacun tua mareka qemuzimuzip a kemasicuay, tucu a vauaq a qadav kanapacun anga aken maleva aken aravac.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: liav aravac a ku pinasiasingan, sa ku papacunan tjay kama kati kina.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: nu tjayvililj uri kiciur aken tjay kama kati kina a semamaza.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
